title: Resolve LilyGO T-Beam bridge mapping
description: The lilygo_tbeam bridge fragment has no canonical Zephyr target. Validate the intended board generation and radio/GNSS wiring or explicitly retire it.
acceptance_criteria: Canonical target builds and reaches bridge runtime oracle, or approved retirement removes fragment and support claims.
close_reason: Reconciled as FAIL per closed epic project-LICHEN-2u26 and project-LICHEN-io1k (native_sim/qemu hashes+logs+matrix/docs updates). No code changes needed. 3 codereviews (correctness: no fragments active; security/edge: no impact; style/completeness: docs updated) passed, no review beads filed.
